message:
test(e2e): add split-lock commit tests (bd-3wop3.8)

Add three new tests for D1-CRITICAL split-lock commit protocol:
- test_split_lock_commit_no_deadlock: verifies 8 concurrent writers
  complete without deadlock using the split-lock protocol
- test_split_lock_commit_scaling: measures throughput at 1/2/4/8
  threads to verify scaling isn't pathological
- test_split_lock_wal_io_does_not_block_prepare: verifies WAL I/O
  in one thread doesn't block prepare phase in another

Also converts existing contention tests to use file-backed databases
with per-thread connections (Connection is not Send-safe).

Tests are marked #[ignore = "manual contention stress test"] since
they require file I/O and are meant for manual stress testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
